def lookup_user(config: dict, username: str) -> dict | None:
    all_keys = list(config.keys())
    if username in all_keys:
        return config[username]
    return None


def find_matching_config(settings: dict, target_key: str) -> str | None:
    keys_list = list(settings.keys())
    if target_key in keys_list:
        return settings[target_key]
    return None


def validate_permissions(user_roles: dict, required_role: str) -> bool:
    available_roles = list(user_roles.keys())
    return required_role in available_roles


def check_feature_flags(flags: dict, feature_name: str) -> bool:
    flag_keys = list(flags.keys())
    if feature_name in flag_keys:
        return flags[feature_name]
    return False
